set_brightness.intent: Set screen brightness to a given percentage (0-100%)

set_auto_brightness.intent: Enable or disable automatic brightness adjustment

set_screen_timeout.intent: Set how long the screen stays on before turning off (in seconds or ms)
set_screen_timeout.encoding: Integer in MILLISECONDS. Common values: 10000 (10s), 15000 (15s), 30000 (30s), 60000 (1min), 120000 (2min), 300000 (5min), 600000 (10min). To convert seconds: seconds * 1000.

set_font_size.encoding: String float. Default "1.0". Common values: "0.85" (smaller), "0.9" (slightly smaller), "1.0" (default/normal), "1.15" (slightly larger), "1.25" (large), "1.3" (extra large), "1.4" (largest). Quotes required in the command.

set_rotation.intent: Enable or disable automatic screen rotation

set_ringer_mode.encoding: ENUM: 0=silent (vibrate only, no ringtone), 1=vibrate (vibrates but no ringtone sound), 2=normal (full ringtone + media sounds).

set_haptic_feedback.intent: Enable or disable haptic vibration feedback on taps

set_sound_effects.intent: Enable or disable system sound effects (tap sounds, lock/unlock sounds)

set_vibrate_ringing.intent: Enable or disable vibration during incoming calls

set_notification_light.intent: Enable or disable notification LED pulsing

toggle_mobile_data.intent: Turn mobile/cellular data on or off

toggle_airplane_mode.intent: Enable or disable airplane mode (kills all radios)
toggle_airplane_mode.encoding: Boolean: 0=off (radios on), 1=on (all radio disabled — Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular). Note: enabling airplane mode may also disable Wi-Fi separately; re-enable wifi_on after if needed.

set_data_roaming.intent: Enable or disable mobile data roaming

set_wifi_sleep_policy.intent: Set when Wi-Fi disconnects during sleep
set_wifi_sleep_policy.encoding: ENUM: 0=never (Wi-Fi stays connected while screen is off), 1=only when plugged in (disconnect on battery, stay on charger), 2=always disconnect (Wi-Fi turns off as soon as screen sleeps).

toggle_low_power.intent: Enable or disable battery saver / low power mode
toggle_low_power.encoding: Boolean: 0=off (normal power), 1=on (battery saver — limits CPU, background sync, location).

set_zen_mode.intent: Set Do Not Disturb / Zen mode
set_zen_mode.encoding: ENUM: 0=off (all sounds and notifications allowed), 1=total_silence (no sounds or vibrations at all — alarms also silenced on some devices), 2=priority_only (only alarms, calls from favorites/starred contacts, and repeated-caller bypass come through).

set_heads_up.encoding: Boolean: 0=off (notifications only in shade), 1=on (notifications appear as floating banners).

set_auto_time.intent: Enable or disable automatic date/time from network

set_auto_time_zone.intent: Enable or disable automatic time zone from network

set_device_name.intent: Set the device's local network name
set_device_name.encoding: String. Freeform device name, e.g. "Pixel-8". Max ~31 chars. Quotes required in the command.

toggle_adb.intent: Enable or disable ADB (Android Debug Bridge) debugging

toggle_sideload.intent: Enable or disable installation from unknown sources

set_location_mode.encoding: ENUM: 0=off (location disabled), 1=battery_saving (Wi-Fi and mobile network triangulation only, no GPS), 2=high_accuracy (GPS + Wi-Fi + mobile network — maximum accuracy).

toggle_high_contrast_text.intent: Enable or disable high-contrast text for accessibility

toggle_screensaver.intent: Enable or disable the screensaver (ambient display while charging)

toggle_doze_always_on.intent: Enable or disable Doze always-on (ambient display when docked and charging)
toggle_doze_always_on.encoding: Boolean: 0=off, 1=on. Requires Doze to be active and charger connected.

set_input_method.intent: Set the default keyboard / input method
set_input_method.encoding: String. Package name of the input method, e.g. "com.google.android.inputmethod.latin/.LatinIME" or short alias like "gboard". Quotes required in the command.

bedtime.intent: Prepare device for sleep: dim screen, silence notifications, enable deep sleep modes
steps: toggle_wifi (0 — off to save battery overnight)
toggle_screensaver (1 — enable screensaver for docked charging)
bedtime.note: Dim screen to ~10%, 30s timeout, full silence, Wi-Fi off, always-on display on.

battery_saver.intent: Maximize battery life by reducing power consumption
steps: set_wifi_sleep_policy (2 — disconnect Wi-Fi when screen sleeps)
battery_saver.note: All major power drains disabled: low-power mode, dim screen, short timeout, Wi-Fi sleep disconnect, and radios off.

driving.intent: Optimize for driving: hands-free connectivity, audible notifications, auto-brightness
driving.note: Bluetooth and audible notifications enabled, auto-brightness for varying light, priority DND to allow calls.

flight_mode.intent: Full airplane mode: disable all wireless radios for flight or EMF-free zone
flight_mode.note: Airplane mode is the master switch; re-enabling individual radios after disabling airplane mode may require explicit re-toggle.

focus_dnd.intent: Maximum focus / Do Not Disturb: silence everything except alarms
focus_dnd.note: All sensory distractions stripped: no sound, no vibration, no visual LEDs. Only alarms will still fire.

gaming.intent: Uninterrupted gaming: block all calls/notifications, maximize screen responsiveness
steps: toggle_airplane_mode (1 — block all calls and network)
set_screen_timeout (300000 ms / 5min — prevent sleep during games)
gaming.note: Airplane mode blocks calls; 5-min timeout prevents screen from dying mid-game; high brightness for visibility.

accessibility_mode.intent: Turn on accessibility features: larger text, high contrast, accessibility services
steps: set_haptic_feedback (1 — enable tactile feedback for visually impaired)
accessibility_mode.note: Font scale "1.3" is large but readable; high contrast and haptics assist users with visual or motor impairments.

privacy_hardened.intent: Maximize privacy: disable location tracking, sideloading, and developer access
privacy_hardened.note: Removes location tracking surface, blocks app sideloading, disables ADB. Restores zen_mode and low_power to defaults.

auto_rotation_on.intent: Enable automatic screen rotation and adaptive brightness
auto_rotation_on.note: Standard day-to-day UX: screen rotates with device and brightness adapts to ambient light.

kiosk_mode.intent: Lock device into a single-purpose mode: no navigation, long screen-on, dim
kiosk_mode.note: Low brightness, long timeout, no network, no interruptions. Suitable for a dedicated display or kiosk.

morning_ready.intent: Wake-up setup: restore normal connectivity and notifications
morning_ready.note: Full restoration of connectivity and notification flow. Resets all modes to day-time defaults.

presentation_mode.intent: Prepare for screen sharing / presentation: keep screen on, silence notifications
steps: set_brightness (100% → 255 — max brightness for projector visibility)
set_rotation (0 — lock portrait/landscape to match projector)
toggle_airplane_mode (0 — keep network for screen mirroring)
presentation_mode.note: Max brightness for projector, no interruptions, fixed rotation. Network stays on for casting/mirroring.
